summary: Iteration 153 Phase A - Premier Cake Designer 3D Asset Library testing complete. Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All iter153 features verified. Fixed backend model to include shape/taper/wave/piping/flowers/stand_kind fields.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend CakeTier model was missing iter153 fields (shape, taper, wave, piping) - FIXED by adding CakePiping model and extending CakeTier
Backend CakeViewerSession was missing flowers and stand_kind fields - FIXED by adding FlowerDeco model and extending session
Frontend CakeViewer implementation is complete with all 57 assets: 7 tier shapes, 12 piping patterns, 8 flower arrangements, 10 stand types, 5 kids templates
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
test_credentials: No auth required for tested endpoints
seed_data_creation: Test sessions created with TEST_ prefix, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter153 Phase A delivered full 3D asset library: (1) 7 tier shapes (round/square/heart/hex/sheet/mad_hatter/topsy_turvy) with shape-specific sliders (taper for mad_hatter, wave for topsy_turvy), (2) 12 piping patterns with Add Piping button per tier, (3) 8 flower arrangements across 10 species, (4) 10 stand types via stand-kind dropdown, (5) 9 templates (4 classic + 5 kids: dinosaur_adventure, unicorn_magic, princess_castle, number_birthday, rainbow_sprinkle). Backend model updated to persist shape/taper/wave/piping/flowers/stand_kind. All features accessible via sidebar → Culinary Operations → Cake Viewer · 3D.

backend_new: GET /api/cake-viewer/templates/dinosaur_adventure — 3 tiers, 3 toppers including dinosaur, rustic_wood stand ✓
GET /api/cake-viewer/templates/unicorn_magic — 3 tiers, 5+ toppers including horn and star ✓
GET /api/cake-viewer/templates/number_birthday — single tier with number topper ✓
Sessions CRUD regression tests all pass ✓
frontend_critical: Cake Viewer opens via sidebar → Culinary Operations → Cake Viewer · 3D ✓
5 tabs render: Design | Client Intake | Cut Guide | Portions & Cost | Templates ✓
Tier shape dropdown exposes all 7 options (round/square/heart/hex/sheet/mad_hatter/topsy_turvy) ✓
Mad Hatter taper slider appears when shape='mad_hatter' ✓
Topsy-Turvy wave slider appears when shape='topsy_turvy' ✓
Add Piping button adds piping row with 12 kind options ✓
Flower Arrangements section shows 8 arrangement buttons ✓
Templates tab shows 9 templates (4 classic + 5 kids) ✓
Dinosaur Adventure template applies 3 green/orange/yellow tiers + dinosaur topper ✓

fixes_applied.backend_model_update: Added CakePiping model, FlowerDeco model, and extended CakeTier with shape/taper/wave/piping fields, CakeViewerSession with flowers/stand_kind fields
